pr.title: ClownCar: Frugendorff compression baseline + canonical DeltaNet integration

output.summary: The Frugendorff crawler loops one shared block four times, recomputing flow instructions per state and widening flat layers to trade saved params for extra capacity under int8 constraints.
techniques: Shared crawler block run across four loops with state-dependent Flow Instructions
Wider flat encoder/decoder layers to reallocate saved parameters into capacity
DeltaNet kernel and CUDA graph focus to tame quantization and loop overhead
